/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,Scene3D.xgde -o /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/CppPlatform/Extensions/Scene3D.xgde CMakeFiles/Scene3D.dir/Model3DObjectConfiguration.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/libGDCore.so
